tmdbOverview: In 1970s India, Sardar Khan vows to take revenge on the man who killed his father decades earlier.
synopsis: Released in 2012, Gangs of Wasseypur - Part 1 is a action, thriller and crime film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.2 on IMDb.
